action.reasoning: Observation: The training script continues to crash with exit code 139 (segmentation fault). Looking at the model implementation, there are several potential issues: 1) The reshaping logic in the forward method might be incorrect, especially when expanding the output dimensions. 2) The model architecture might be too complex for the current setup. 3) There could be issues with how the GCN layers are applied. I need to simplify the model significantly to avoid these crashes. I'll create a much simpler model that processes the spatiotemporal data in a more straightforward way.
